title: Codex archive boundary smoke checker
provenance: Owner approved first real candidate to test candidate-inbox to existing Builder self-growth queue bridge.
intended_capability: Add or grow a Builder check that verifies Codex/read-boundary guidance around zz_MUSORKA_DO_NOT_READ_BY_CODEX remains visible and not bypassed during normal orientation.
risk_notes: Low risk. No external code. No dependency install. No direct mutation of accepted core. Candidate must be processed by existing Builder self-growth organs only.
acceptance_expectation: Builder must create an atom candidate through existing self-growth loop, validate in sandbox, prove no archive scanning or accepted-core mutation, then accept or reject by normal Builder proof rules.
owner_notes: This candidate is material for Builder self-growth, not a direct patch.
